title: leuconymphaea tussilagifolia
intro: Leuconymphaea tussilagifolia, also known as Coltsfoot, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its expectorant properties, helping to relieve coughs and congestion by loosening and thinning mucus in the lungs. The medicinal properties of Coltsfoot include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and protecting against cell damage. Coltsfoot can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to support respiratory health and alleviate symptoms of bronchitis and asthma.
